text:
Created attachment 202392
update irc/bitlbee-mastodon t0 1.4.2

Update irc/bitlbee-mastodon to 1.4.2

Changelog:
- small improvements to command parsing and feedback
- better handling of multiple mentions
- better handling of direct messages
- possible fix to a crash related to filters

* poudriere testport: ok (after setting MAKE_TARGET to install-strip to satisfy a QA warning)
* portlint -AC: ok
